title: Plasmid construction
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6e3hs","text":"Q5® High-Fidelity DNA Polymerases (NEB)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7qef6","text":"restriction enzymes (NEB)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7hldr","text":"quick CIP (NEB)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gmet","text":"T4 ligase (NEB)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5tng4","text":"Gel extraction kit (Bio Basic)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Purify the DNA from gel using a Gel extraction kit (Bio Basic).
Linearize the backbone with restriction enzymes (NEB).
Amplify the insert gene fragment by PCR with primers including 21 nt of overlapping sequence with the target gene.
Run PCR products and linearized backbone in an agarose gel to confirm the size.
Ligate the linearized backbone and the insert with the T4 ligase (NEB).
Treat linearized backbone with quick CIP (NEB).
Transform the ligation products into home made competent cells.
Perform colony PCR to screen for colons that with inserted gene.
Sequence to verify that the inserted gene is correct.
creator: Chunmei Chang
